title: Sea-mouse
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sea-mice''' were small mouse-like creatures that were able to live on land ''or'' underwater by morphing their paws into fins—and vice-versa—through a process known as [[corpus mutatio]]. Although this species was originally from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], many had been known to occupy some areas of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. Since this planet is covered entirely by water, most sea-mice inhabiting Kamino have lost their ability to use corpus mutatio. When, in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the planet [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] was destroyed by the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]], the sea-mice still able to use corpus mutatio were wiped out entirely.

Sea-mice were often used as food for pet [[sea eel]]s or [[rollerfish]].

The [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] word for "sea-mouse" was ''iiaa''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]'' {{1st}}
